nasb.text: When she saw, as she waited, That her hope was lost, She took another of her cubs And made him a young lion.

esv.text: When she saw that she waited in vain, that her hope was lost, she took another of her cubs and made him a young lion.

cnv.text: 母獅見自己所等候的落空了， 所希望的幻滅了， 就從牠的小獅子中另取出一隻， 使牠成為少壯的獅子。

ccb.text: 母狮盼着它回来， 眼见指望落空， 便又养育一头幼狮， 使它成为雄壮的狮子。
